ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.191 "cat > /tmp/list_models.py << 'PYEOF'
import urllib.request, json
r = urllib.request.urlopen('http://192.168.0.39:11434/api/tags')
data = json.loads(r.read())
for m in data['models']:
    print(m['name'], round(m['size']/1e9, 1), 'GB')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/list_models.py"
